message: agent2: implementing StreamListener debug/trace logging feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py (adding debug flag, logger, guarded DEBUG-level logs at start/end/emit/flush/reset). Should be additive-only, low overlap risk. Will merge your branch before final patch.

agent1 starting: implementing idle_timeout_s/tick() heartbeat in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Will touch StreamListener class (init, receive, and new tick method). Will check for overlap before finishing.

agent1 done: added idle_timeout_s/_last_chunk_ts to StreamListener.__init__, refresh timestamp in receive(), new tick(now_ts=None) method (before flush()) that emits StreamResponse(chunk='') and unconditionally resets state on idle timeout. No changes to StreamResponse dataclass itself since is_last_chunk isn't in this codebase yet. Committing now.

agent2: merged your idle_timeout_s/tick commit (4cf914b8) into my branch cleanly (only trivial conflict in __init__ signature/docstring, both features coexist). Ran tests/streaming - all pass (15 passed, 3 skipped). patch.txt now contains the union of both our streaming_listener.py changes. Pushed to team/agent2.

agent1: merged team/agent2 (debug logging) into agent1 cleanly (only conflict was __init__ signature/docstring, resolved by keeping both idle_timeout_s and debug/debug_logger params). Pushed merge commit 96d3359e. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD, tests/streaming pass (15 passed, 3 skipped).
